how_it_works.description: From sign-up to mastery, we guide you through every step of your learning journey.

1.title: Choose your language
1.desc: Select the African language you want to learn from our available languages: Ewondo, Duala, Bassa, Bamileke, and more.

2.title: Follow your path
2.desc: Progress step by step with our structured learning paths. Every lesson brings you closer to fluency.

3.title: Explore the dictionary
3.desc: Access thousands of words with illustrations, authentic pronunciations, usage examples, and idiomatic expressions.

4.title: Learn in context
4.desc: Discover every word with visual context, pronunciation, translation, and real-life usage examples.

testimonials.description: Join thousands of Africans rediscovering and preserving their linguistic heritage.

1.content: Ovúmá allowed me to reconnect with my Beti roots. The lessons are engaging and the community is incredibly supportive. I can finally talk to my grandmother in her native language!

2.content: As a business owner, I understand the importance of our local languages. Ovúmá is the perfect tool to pass them on to my children while having fun.

3.content: Ovúmá's pedagogical approach is remarkable. My students love learning Duala and Ewondo thanks to interactive exercises and cultural stories.

about.description: Ovúmá was born from a conviction: our native languages must not disappear. Every day, we work so that Africans can pass on their language and culture to their children, wherever they are in the world.
about.dictionary_desc1: Explore thousands of words with visual illustrations, authentic pronunciations by native speakers, and concrete usage examples. Every word is an open door to our culture.
about.dictionary_desc2: Our dictionary grows every day thanks to the contribution of our community of native speakers and linguistic experts.
about.fun_desc1: Challenge your friends, earn points, and climb the leaderboard! Our playful approach makes learning addictive and motivating.
about.fun_desc2: Join a community of over 50,000 passionate learners progressing together every day.

passion.title: Cultural Passion
passion.desc: We believe every language is a treasure to be preserved for future generations.

access.title: Accessibility
access.desc: Making African language learning accessible to everyone, everywhere in the world.

community.title: Community
community.desc: Creating a space for exchange and mutual aid between learners and native speakers.

excellence.title: Pedagogical Excellence
excellence.desc: Innovative teaching methods based on linguistic research.

stats.quote: "A language that dies is a vision of the world that disappears."

cta.description: Download the app for free and access all our features. Available on iOS and Android.

hero.description: Ovúmá was born from a deep passion for African languages and a vision: to use technology to preserve and pass on our rich linguistic heritage to future generations.

history.title: Our story
history.p1: It all started with a strong conviction: that Africa's linguistic richness should not disappear, but be reinvented.
history.p2: As a digital professional committed to promoting local cultures and uses, I was faced with a worrying reality: an entire generation, particularly in the diaspora, is progressively disconnecting from its native languages.
history.p3: Faced with this observation, I initiated Ovúmá, a project at the intersection of technology, pedagogy, and cultural identity. Along with linguists, native speakers, and tech talents, I designed an innovative solution: a mobile app that makes learning African languages accessible, modern, and engaging.
history.p4: Designed as a true user experience, Ovúmá combines structured content, cultural immersion, and an intuitive approach, in line with my commitment to building useful, impactful, and well-designed digital products.
history.p5: Today, Ovúmá is a growing platform driven by a clear vision: to reconnect Africans with their roots and promote the linguistic heritage of Africa on a large scale.

team.title: Our team
team.subtitle: Passionate people serving African languages and cultures

emmanuel.bio: Digital professional passionate about promoting local cultures and uses. Initiator of Ovúmá, a project at the crossroads of technology, pedagogy, and African cultural identity.

cta.title: Join our mission
cta.description: Together, let's preserve and pass on the richness of our African languages. Download Ovúmá and start your linguistic journey today.

values_desc.impact: Contributing to the preservation of African linguistic heritage and strengthening cultural identities.

questions.question: What is Ovúmá?
questions.answer: Ovúmá is the first mobile platform for learning African languages. Our mission is to preserve and promote local languages such as Ewondo, Duala, Bassa, Bamileke and many others, by making their learning accessible, fun and effective.

questions.question: Which languages can I learn with Ovúmá?
questions.answer: Currently, Ovúmá offers lessons for several major African languages: Ewondo, Duala, Bassa, Bamileke, Fulfulde, Beti, and Basaa. We regularly add new languages based on community demand.

questions.question: Is the app available on iOS and Android?
questions.answer: Yes! Ovúmá is available for free on the App Store (iOS) and Google Play (Android). You can download the app and start learning immediately.

questions.question: Do I need prior knowledge to start?
questions.answer: Absolutely not! Ovúmá is designed for all levels, from complete beginner to advanced. Our system adapts lessons to your level and pace.

questions.question: How does learning on Ovúmá work?
questions.answer: Our method combines several pedagogical approaches: interactive lessons with native audio, pronunciation exercises, fun quizzes, simulated conversations, and spaced repetition.

questions.question: Can I learn multiple languages at the same time?
questions.answer: Yes! With a Premium subscription, you can learn as many African languages as you want simultaneously.

questions.question: Does the app work offline?
questions.answer: Yes, once you have downloaded the lessons, you can learn offline. Your progress will be automatically synchronized once you reconnect to the Internet.

cgu.title: Terms of Service
cgu.content:
1. Overview

Ovúmá is a mobile application for learning African languages, published by Emmanuel Etoundi (hereinafter "Ovúmá", "we").

By accessing and using the application, you acknowledge that you have read and agree to these Terms of Service (ToS) without reservation.

If you do not accept these terms, you must not use the application.

2. Access to the Service

2.1 Account Creation

Using Ovúmá requires creating an account with a valid email address and password.

You are responsible for the confidentiality of your credentials and any activity carried out from your account.

2.2 Age Requirements

The application is accessible to persons aged at least 13 years.

If you are a minor, you must have authorization from a parent or legal guardian.

2.3 Availability

We strive to provide access to the service 24/7.

However, interruptions may occur (maintenance, updates, force majeure events).

Ovúmá does not guarantee continuous, uninterrupted access.

3. Use of Third-Party Platforms

The application may be distributed through third-party platforms, including Google Play.

The use of these platforms is subject to their own terms and conditions.

Ovúmá cannot be held responsible for decisions, restrictions, or interruptions related to these platforms.

4. Content and Intellectual Property

4.1 Ownership

All content (texts, audio, images, videos, exercises, translations) is protected by copyright and remains the exclusive property of Ovúmá or its partners.

4.2 Permitted Use

Content is reserved for personal, non-commercial use.

It is strictly prohibited to:

  • Copy, reproduce, or distribute content without authorization
  • Commercially exploit the application
  • Extract data through automated means
  • Circumvent protection systems

Any violation constitutes infringement subject to legal action.

4.3 Cultural Respect

Ovúmá is committed to promoting African languages and cultures with respect and authenticity.

5. Service Operation

Ovúmá is an educational tool.

We do not guarantee a specific level of language proficiency.

Results depend on the user's personal commitment.

We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or remove certain features at any time.

6. User Accounts

6.1 Obligations

You agree to:

  • Provide accurate information
  • Not use the service for fraudulent purposes
  • Not disrupt the operation of the application
  • Not impersonate a third party

6.2 User Content

If the application allows the publication of content (text, audio, etc.), you are solely responsible for it.

Ovúmá reserves the right to remove any inappropriate content.

7. Subscriptions and Payments

7.1 Offer

Ovúmá offers a free version and paid premium features.

7.2 Pricing

Prices are displayed before any purchase, according to your region.

7.3 Payment via Platforms

Payments made via Google Play are subject to their conditions. Refunds are handled according to the rules of the platform used.

7.4 Renewal

Subscriptions are automatically renewed unless cancelled before the expiry date.

7.5 Cancellation

You may cancel at any time from your account or device.

No refund will be granted for a period already started, unless required by law.

7.6 Price Changes

Prices may be modified with 30 days' notice.

8. Account Suspension and Deletion

8.1 By the User

You may delete your account at any time.

Data will be deleted within a maximum of 30 days.

8.2 By Ovúmá

We may suspend or delete an account in the event of:

  • Violation of the ToS
  • Fraudulent activity
  • Security risk
  • Prolonged inactivity (24 months)

9. Personal Data

Ovúmá collects certain data (email, usage data, analytics) necessary for the operation of the service.

This data is processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

10. Liability

Ovúmá is provided "as is". To the extent permitted by law:

  • We do not guarantee the absence of errors
  • We are not responsible for indirect damages

11. Force Majeure

Ovúmá cannot be held responsible for events beyond its control (network outages, disasters, etc.).

12. International Use

The user is responsible for compliance with the laws in force in their country of use.

13. Changes to the ToS

The ToS may be modified at any time.

Important changes will be notified at least 15 days before they take effect.

14. Applicable Law

These ToS are governed by Cameroonian law.

In the event of a dispute, the competent courts of Yaoundé shall have exclusive jurisdiction.

15. Contact

For any questions or complaints:

Email: etoundiemmanuelj@gmail.com

(please specify the subject of your request)

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
1. Introduction

Ovúmá ("we", "our") is a mobile application for learning African languages.

This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, protect, and share your personal data when you use our services.

By using Ovúmá, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

2. Data Controller

The data controller is:

  • Name: Ovúmá
  • Contact: Emmanuel Etoundi
  • Location: Douala, Cameroon
  • Email: etoundiemmanuelj@gmail.com

3. Data Collected

We only collect data necessary for the application to function.

3.1 Data provided by the user

  • Email address
  • Name or username (optional)
  • Password (hashed, never in plaintext)
  • Profile picture (optional)

3.2 Automatically collected data

  • Learning progress
  • Usage data (lessons, scores, frequency)
  • Technical data (device, OS, app version)
  • Device identifier
  • IP address (temporary, security purposes)
  • Error logs and diagnostics

3.3 Subscription-related data

  • Subscription type
  • Payment history
  • Subscription and renewal dates

Important: Payment data is processed solely by secure third-party services (e.g. Stripe or Google Play). We never store your complete banking information.

3.4 Optional data

  • Country / language
  • Language level
  • Learning preferences

3.5 Data we do NOT collect

  • GPS location
  • Contacts
  • Microphone / camera (unless explicitly used in the future)
  • Activity outside the application

4. Purposes of Processing

Your data is used to:

  • Create and manage your account
  • Provide personalized learning
  • Save your progress
  • Manage subscriptions
  • Improve the application (analytics)
  • Ensure security and prevent fraud
  • Send you notifications (with consent)

5. Legal Bases (GDPR & international)

We process your data based on:

  • Contract performance
  • Consent (notifications, marketing)
  • Legitimate interest (improvement, security)
  • Legal obligations

6. Data Sharing

We never sell your data. It may be shared only with necessary service providers:

  • Hosting: Vercel
  • Database: Neon
  • Payment: Stripe / Google Play
  • Notifications: Firebase / Expo
  • External content: YouTube

These providers are contractually required to protect your data.

7. International Transfers

Your data may be transferred outside your country (e.g. United States). In such cases, we implement:

  • Standard contractual clauses
  • Enhanced security measures
  • Data encryption

8. Data Retention

  • Account data: lifetime of the account
  • Deletion: within 30 days of request
  • Billing data: up to 10 years
  • Analytics data: anonymized

9. Security

We apply strict measures:

  • HTTPS/TLS encryption
  • Password hashing
  • Restricted access
  • Monitoring and logs
  • Secure backups

10. Your Rights

You have the following rights:

  • Access to your data
  • Rectification
  • Deletion
  • Objection
  • Portability
  • Withdrawal of consent

Contact: etoundiemmanuelj@gmail.com

11. Push Notifications

Notifications are optional. You can disable them at any time through your device settings.

12. Cookies and Similar Technologies

We use:

  • Technical cookies (required)
  • Analytics (product improvement)

Non-essential cookies require your consent.

13. Children

Ovúmá is accessible from the age of 13. For minors:

  • Parental consent required
  • Immediate deletion if non-compliant

14. Data Security (Incident)

In the event of a high-risk data breach, we will notify you in accordance with legal obligations.

15. Service Evolution

We may modify this policy at any time. In the event of a major change:

  • In-app or email notification

16. Google Play Compliance

Ovúmá complies with Google Play requirements regarding:

  • Data transparency
  • User consent
  • Data minimization
  • Security

17. Contact and Complaints

Email: etoundiemmanuelj@gmail.com

You may also contact:

  • National Agency for Information and Communication Technologies
  • Local data protection authority (if applicable)
